arrowSchema.arrow:
SchemaId: fixed_size_binary[8] not null
Schema: binary not null
SchemaEpoch: int64
-- schema metadata --
opcua.mapping: 'arrow-schema-announcement'

fields.description: Raw 8-byte SchemaId: the first 8 bytes of SHA-256 over the serialized Arrow Schema.
fields.name: SchemaId

fields.description: Serialized Arrow Schema IPC message bytes.
fields.name: Schema

fields.description: Optional operational epoch; not part of SchemaId calculation.
fields.name: SchemaEpoch
